layout.sidebar: w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 hidden md:flex flex-col h-screen fixed top-0 left-0 z-40
layout.header: h-16 bg-white border-b border-slate-200 flex items-center justify-between px-6 sticky top-0 z-30 ml-0 md:ml-64
layout.main_content: flex-1 ml-0 md:ml-64 p-6 lg:p-8 pt-6
layout.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-6 transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md hover:border-indigo-200
layout.auth_layout: min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-50 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 bg-cover bg-center bg-no-repeat

components.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-indigo-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors
components.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 shadow-sm hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors
components.input: block w-full rounded-md border-slate-300 shadow-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-indigo-500 sm:text-sm p-2 border
components.table_container: overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm
components.table_header_cell: bg-slate-50 px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-slate-200
components.badge_success: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800
components.badge_warning: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-amber-100 text-amber-800
components.badge_indigo: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a cleaner, more professional look matching the Odoo aesthetic. Wrap dashboard stat icons in a soft rounded container (e.g., w-12 h-12 rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 flex items-center justify-center).

images.description: Modern school building for login page background. Apply a heavy overlay like bg-indigo-950/80 to ensure login form legibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components extensively for tables, dropdowns, dialogs, and cards to maintain a high-quality SaaS feel.

For the dashboard metrics, follow Odoo's card pattern: left icon (inside a soft colored circle like bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600), right stat value, and a small sparkline or trend indicator if applicable.
Implement Recharts for attendance and assignment progress visualisations. Use clean, gridless charts with the brand indigo and purple colors.
Apply `data-testid` to ALL interactive elements per the guidelines (e.g., data-testid='admin-sidebar-students', data-testid='mark-attendance-btn').
Use 'Work Sans' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Make sure to import them from Google Fonts.
Keep borders very subtle (slate-200) and avoid heavy shadows on standard cards. Reserve shadows for dropdowns and modals.
Include a prominent section header on every page (e.g., 'Student Directory', 'Course Management') before the content grid or table. Align it to the left.
For forms, use a 2-column grid layout where appropriate to mimic ERP density, but maintain good padding (p-6).
Ensure the sidebar has clear active states (indigo-50 background, indigo-700 text) to indicate the current module.
The authentication page should have a split layout or a centered card over the 'auth_background' image with a dark indigo overlay for contrast.
